paper: Learning to Translate Noise for Robust Image Denoising, arXiv:2412.04727v2
variant: No-GT adaptation: C_hat = N2N(I1); D' blind-Gaussian specialist over measured real-noise range

data.note: log1p 域实测噪声 sigma_mad: level1=0.43, level2=0.21, level3=0.14, level4=0.10 (~1/N)

gaussian_expert.bootstrap_checkpoint: <N2N checkpoint>  # C_hat = N2N(I1) 作为 clean 目标
gaussian_expert.note: 盲高斯区间覆盖真实跨度且下界远离 0，堵死 T 学恒等映射
gaussian_expert.crop_batch_note: 与 N2N 对齐：同网络/同数据/同任务，BN 统计稳、用满 GPU

translator.bootstrap_checkpoint: <N2N checkpoint>  # 与 explicit 同锚 C_hat=N2N(I1)
translator.crop_batch_note: crop512 利于 explicit 分布统计；两张 A5000(24G) 实测 512/12 可跑（论文为 256/4）
